Group.label: Proper Nouns
Group.description: Checks names of places, organizations, products, and other proper nouns that should keep their standard capitalization.

Group.label: Initialisms
Group.description: Covers abbreviated forms and initialisms that should use the expected letter casing or punctuation.

Group.label: Closed Compounds
Group.description: Flags compound words that should be written as a single closed form instead of split apart.

Group.label: Phrase Corrections
Group.description: Collects common phrase-level fixes where a standard expression is preferred over a mistaken variant.

Group.label: Capitalization and Case
Group.description: Catches capitalization and casing issues in titles, sentences, brands, and other case-sensitive text.

Group.label: Punctuation and Spacing
Group.description: Handles punctuation marks, apostrophes, quotation marks, commas, and spacing conventions.

Group.label: Numbers and Units
Group.description: Checks how numbers, dates, times, decades, and measurement units are written.

Group.label: Pronouns and Possession
Group.description: Focuses on pronouns, contractions, possessives, and related agreement problems.

Group.label: Compounds and Hyphenation
Group.description: Covers hyphenation and multi-word compounds that should be open, closed, or hyphenated.

Group.label: Spelling and Orthography
Group.description: Flags misspellings, orthographic inconsistencies, and word forms that are spelled the wrong way.

Group.label: Style and Redundancy
Group.description: Highlights wordy, repetitive, or overly weak phrasing that can usually be tightened up.

Group.label: Grammar and Agreement
Group.description: Catches grammar issues involving agreement, articles, prepositions, verb forms, and sentence structure.

Group.label: Word Choice and Usage
Group.description: Suggests more standard or idiomatic wording when a phrase is technically understandable but poorly chosen.

Group.label: Regionalisms and Dialect
Group.description: Groups dialect-sensitive wording and regional usage that may not fit the selected audience.

Group.label: Miscellaneous
Group.description: A catch-all for rules that do not fit neatly into the other categories but are still useful to surface.
